name: word-three-line-table-addin
description: Word for Mac Office.js add-in for formatting selected tables as academic three-line tables.

scripts.check: node --check src/formatter.js && node --check src/taskpane.js && node --check src/commands.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-icons.mjs && node --check scripts/build-release.mjs && node --check scripts/build-github-release.mjs && bash -n scripts/create-local-cert.sh && bash -n scripts/install-manifest-mac.sh && bash -n install-mac.command && bash -n start-mac.command
